EditTextPreference.android:title: Watch Auth Key
EditTextPreference.app:dialogMessage: DO NOT CHANGE!! (Unless you know what you are doing)
EditTextPreference.app:summary: Key needed for authenticating with watch

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Keep running in background
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Keep GTR 2e service running in the background even if app is cleared from recent apps.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Check App Updates
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Automatically check for app updates when app is opened.
Call alerts for apps like Whatsapp, instagram etc.
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enable Voip call Alerts

Preference.app:summary: This app heavily relies on the hard work of the GadgetBridge project and its contributers for its Authentication, encryption/decryption of payload logics and reverse-engineered commands for device operations.\nAlso this app uses logic from python project HuaToken for its initial Zepp/Xiaomi login and auth key fetch.
